config_template.broadcast: input_tensor_c may be row/last-dim broadcast shape [1,B,1,D] against [1,B,N,D]

applicability_notes: torch_pattern_source: golden: torch.addcmul(input_tensor_a, input_tensor_b, input_tensor_c, value=value); call_site comment: 'spatial_1BND = spatial_1BND + spatial_ff_1BND * c_gate_msa_1B1D'; ttnn_replacement: ttnn.addcmul(input_tensor_a, input_tensor_b, input_tensor_c, value=value); constraints: {'num_inputs': 3, 'all_inputs_tile_layout': True, 'scalar_value_kw': 'value', 'notes': 'Higher-precision compute_kernel_config may be needed for correctness when fusing residual-add * gate (per call-site NOTE).'}; fusion_notes: Replaces contiguous mul->add (residual + gate * branch_output) chain common in adaptive-norm/DiT gating: x = x + ffn_out * gate. Also fusable further into matmul epilogue via ffn.forward_fused_addcmul when tensors are TP-sharded.
